infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Car Cab Org uses your location to dispatch a driver to your exact pickup location for vehicle retrieval.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Car Cab Org uses your location in the background to track your retrieval in real time and ensure your driver reaches you safely.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Car Cab Org uses your camera for driver identity verification to ensure your safety.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Car Cab Org accesses your photo library to upload your driver profile photo.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Car Cab Org does not access your contacts.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Car Cab Org uses your location to track your vehicle retrieval in real time.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Car Cab Org uses your background location to keep your retrieval on track.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Car Cab Org uses your location to dispatch a driver to you.
